1728330.name: Virtual Audio Reactive Concert Hall
1728330.description:
Virtual Audio Reactive Concert Hall (V/ARCH) is a Unity-built audio visualizer in the form of a concert stage for your karaoke and music streams! It will listen to any audio running in the background from any source, be it media player, browser, or even another game. Simply run V/ARCH and play the music!

Current Known Issues

Audio visualization may not work if playing audio from a source that is controlled by an audio interface like the GoXLR. A workaround for this is to disconnect the audio source from the interface software.
1728330.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
